CA.liquidated_damages: May be unenforceable under CA Civil Code §1671
CA.non_compete_post_term: May not be enforceable under CA law
CA.termination: CA Bus. & Prof. Code §§20000-20043 governs; law controls over FA
CA.financing: Must comply with CA Finance Lenders Law

HI.general_release: Must exclude claims under Hawaii Franchise Investment Law

IL.venue: Venue outside IL void (but arbitration outside IL permitted)
IL.waiver: Cannot waive compliance with IL Franchise Disclosure Act

IN.governing_law: Indiana Deceptive Franchise Practices Act and Franchise Disclosure Law apply

MD.fee_refund: Provisions for refund within first year
MD.general_release: Does not release from MD law liability

MI.non_renewal: Must compensate fair market value; 180 days notice for non-renewal

MN.termination_notice: 90 days notice of termination (60 days to cure)
MN.venue: Litigation cannot be required outside Minnesota

NY.termination_by_franchisee: May terminate upon any grounds available by law (overrides Item 17(d))

ND.arbitration_venue: Venue outside ND may not be enforceable

RI.venue: Must comply with §19-28.1-14 of RI Franchise Investment Act

SD.governing_law: SD law governs; inconsistent provisions void

VA.fees: Not more than disclosed under VA Retail Franchising Act
VA.termination: Notice provisions governed by VA law

WA.arbitration_venue: Must be in WA, mutually agreed, or determined by arbitrator
WA.conflict_of_laws: WA Franchise Investment Protection Act prevails
WA.release: Void except in negotiated settlement with independent counsel
WA.transfer_fees: Collectable only to extent reflecting reasonable costs

WI.governing_law: Wisconsin Fair Dealership Law (ch. 135) governs and supersedes inconsistent FA provisions
